channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Louisiana lawmakers working to pass map that could eliminate majority Black districts
item.description: Primary elections have started in Louisiana, but votes cast in congressional races may not count as the Republican legislature is redrawing district lines to get one more Republican seat.
item.content:encoded: Primary elections have started in Louisiana, but votes cast in congressional races may not count as the Republican legislature is redrawing district lines to get one more Republican seat.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: How the SCOTUS voting rights ruling could affect Congress, according to Eric Holder
item.description: Eric Holder, chairman of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, talks with NPR's Michel Martin about a Supreme Court ruling that could pave the way for a drop in Black representation in Congress.
item.content:encoded:
Eric Holder, chairman of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, talks with NPR's Michel Martin about a Supreme Court ruling that could pave the way for a drop in Black representation in Congress.

(Image credit: Toya Sarno Jordan/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Trump administration falls behind on wildfire prevention with risky fire season ahead
item.description: Many of the nation's overgrown forests are at high risk of burning. Under the Trump administration, work to reduce flammable vegetation fell by more than a million acres compared to previous years.
item.content:encoded:
Many of the nation's overgrown forests are at high risk of burning. Under the Trump administration, work to reduce flammable vegetation fell by more than a million acres compared to previous years.

(Image credit: Justin Sullivan/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Lauren Sommer

item.title: The oldest millennials are 45! This tool helps plan for longevity
item.description: The oldest millennials are turning 45 this year. The oldest Gen Xers are now 60. So how prepared will they be to thrive in the decades ahead? A new tool helps people assess beyond just savings.
item.content:encoded:
The oldest millennials are turning 45 this year. The oldest Gen Xers are now 60. So how prepared will they be to thrive in the decades ahead? A new tool helps people assess beyond just savings.

(Image credit: Mar Hernández for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump says he's reviewing a new plan from Iran, Louisiana lawmakers redrawing districts after SCOTUS decision, a look at the Senate races to watch.
item.content:encoded: Trump says he's reviewing a new plan from Iran, Louisiana lawmakers redrawing districts after SCOTUS decision, a look at the Senate races to watch.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Former DHS official talks about Israel's destruction of her ancestral home
item.description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Fayrouz Saad, a former assistant secretary at DHS, about the Israeli military's destruction of her family's ancestral home in southern Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Fayrouz Saad, a former assistant secretary at DHS, about the Israeli military's destruction of her family's ancestral home in southern Lebanon.
item.dc:creator: Michel Martin

item.title: Rescuers help Timmy, a stranded whale, return home
item.description: Rescuers defy warnings as the stranded "Humpback Hope," also known in German media as Timmy, is carried by barge into the North Sea, racing against time to save her.
item.content:encoded: Rescuers defy warnings as the stranded "Humpback Hope," also known in German media as Timmy, is carried by barge into the North Sea, racing against time to save her.
item.dc:creator: Rob Schmitz

item.title: Spirit Airlines shutters after federal bailout falls through
item.description: Spirit Airlines announced over the weekend it would stop flying following years of financial struggles. The ultra-low-cost carrier wanted a $500 million federal bailout from the Trump administration.
item.content:encoded: Spirit Airlines announced over the weekend it would stop flying following years of financial struggles. The ultra-low-cost carrier wanted a $500 million federal bailout from the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Augmented reality tool lets farmers walk in their livestock's hooves
item.description: In order to reduce the stress on animals for better qualities of milk and meat, some farmers and producers are using an Augmented reality tool to help them see what cows actually see.
item.content:encoded: In order to reduce the stress on animals for better qualities of milk and meat, some farmers and producers are using an Augmented reality tool to help them see what cows actually see.
item.dc:creator: Hope Kirwan

item.title: White House says its cut VA wait times, but new study paints more complicated picture
item.description: The Trump administration claims it has cut VA staff while also shortening wait times for care. A new study shows a more complicated picture, with longer wait times in several key areas.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration claims it has cut VA staff while also shortening wait times for care. A new study shows a more complicated picture, with longer wait times in several key areas.
item.dc:creator: Quil Lawrence
